name: Diego logs a cash payment via the assistant — '$500 cash from Patel for invoice #123'
description: Some payments don't arrive through Stripe (cash, check, ACH outside the app). Diego tells the assistant about a payment he just received. The LLM extracts amount + method + invoice reference; surfaces a record_payment action card; on confirm, persists a Payment row, marks the linked Invoice 'paid' (or partial), and pulses /payments + /dashboard outstanding.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.role: Just got cash on the jobsite
persona.context: Standing next to his truck. Wants to log the payment before he forgets.

preconditions: Invoice #123 (Patel · fence) exists in 'unpaid' status, amount $500.00 (50000 cents)

steps.action: On /assistant: 'I just got $500 cash from Patel for invoice #123'
steps.expect: LLM extracts amount=50000 cents, method='cash', invoiceRef='#123'; emits a record_payment action card with those fields populated

steps.action: Reviews the card, taps 'Confirm and log'
steps.expect: PaymentStore.create persists Payment {amount:50000, method:'cash', invoiceId:'<resolved>', receivedAt:now}; Invoice → paid; activity event 'Payment received · $500 cash · Patel'
/payments hero increments landed; PSideTopPayors gains/updates Patel; /dashboard 'Money owed' decreases by $500
Assistant offers an inline correction; UpdatePaymentDto path (amount=25000) re-runs; Invoice flips to 'partial'

evaluationCriteria.check: Action card matches the existing send_quote/send_contract card visual — same chrome, different verb
User trusts the assistant got the amount right because it shows it back as a confirmable card
Cents math is correct end-to-end; invoice 'partial' vs 'paid' status flips on the right boundary
Card form fields are labeled; amount uses inputmode='numeric'
